text: What an incredible achievement! Finishing your first marathon is something to be truly proud of. You've proven to yourself that you can set an ambitious goal and see it through to the end, no matter how challenging the miles get. The dedication, training, and mental toughness it takes to cross that finish line is remarkable. You should celebrate this moment and everything you've accomplished. Whether it was a personal record or simply getting across that finish line, you've joined a special group of people who know what it takes to run 26.2 miles. Congratulations on this amazing milestone. You've earned it.
